raw_resume_text: Charda Williams (248) 508-2939 | williams.charda16@gmail.com Profile Experienced business professional of 5 years within the supply chain management field, with a Master of Business Administration. Highly experienced in managing operations, inventory, ERP systems, transportation and warehouse management. Experience Operations Manager | Kroger Delivery | September 2024 – Current Ensure orders arrive and dispatch on time; schedule, train, observe, and develop warehouse supervisors; oversee warehouse productivity and KPIs; allocate space for stock rotation and maintain inventory levels. Operations Traffic Supervisor | Universal Logistics Holdings | July 2023 – September 2024 Managed team of 20 employees; oversaw freight operations for Fortune 500 automotive companies; prepared productivity reports; ensured safety protocols. Assistant Rental Manager | Penske Truck Leasing | August 2021 – August 2023 Managed team of 12 employees; fleet inventory; hazardous materials; dispatched drivers; managed billing and contracts; scheduled fleet service. Education MBA HR Management | Central Michigan University | January 2020 – November 2022 Skills WMS, SAP, Dispatch, Fleet Management, Logistics, DOT, ERP, EDI, Safety, MS Office, Transportation Management, Communication, Inventory Management.

structured_resume.name: Charda Williams
structured_resume.summary: Operations and supply chain professional with MBA and 5+ years of experience managing logistics, transportation, warehouse operations, ERP systems, and inventory management.

responsibilities: Ensure on-time order dispatch and delivery accuracy
Schedule, train, and develop warehouse supervisors
Oversee warehouse productivity and KPI performance
Manage inventory levels and stock rotation protocols
Oversaw freight loading and unloading operations
Oversaw fleet inventory and hazardous materials
Dispatched drivers and coordinated fleet operations
Managed billing, contracts, and service scheduling
